message:
⚡ Lazy-load xterm via PodExecTerminal in PodDrillDown (#10890)

PodExecTerminal imports @xterm/xterm + @xterm/addon-fit (~200KB).
It only renders when the user clicks the 'Exec' tab in a pod
drill-down, so eagerly loading it bloats the main bundle.

Changes:
- Add default export to PodExecTerminal.tsx (keeps named export too)
- Use React.lazy() + Suspense in PodDrillDown.tsx
- Suspense fallback shows a spinner matching the drill-down style

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
